title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in AI chips, models, and applications, China holds a structural advantage in powering AI data centers through centralized energy grid planning and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high voltage transmission lines. The US fragmented regulatory approach across federal, state, and local jurisdictions constrains data center buildout, forcing major tech companies to seek behind-the-meter and off-grid solutions.
